meaning: adj.不平坦的,不平均的,不均匀的,奇数的
examples: He staggered on the uneven surface.
The floor felt uneven under his feet.
He could hear that her breathing was uneven.
The global economy will remain on a modest and uneven path for some time to come.
Gilt's high valuation and uneven financial performance mean selling the company is unlikely at the moment.
